office_does: Commissioners adopt budgets and county policy and oversee departments and services.
race_blurb: Incumbent Robert Rosencrantz faces small-business owner Brandy Parker Warren.

candidates.summary: Small-business owner emphasizing responsible growth, local services, collaboration, and accountability.
highlights: Calls for practical locally driven decisions [S2]
Emphasizes strong local services and responsible growth [S2]

candidates.summary: Incumbent District 2 commissioner serving since September 2021.

experience.basis: Multi-year incumbency establishes a direct proven governing record.
